hooks.command: [ "$(git -C ~/ai-code/vlc-openclaw branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit on main branch. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feature/step-N-description"}' >&2; exit 2; }

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'test_\|_test\.py'; then cd ~/ai-code/vlc-openclaw && python -m pytest "$FILE" -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || echo 'Syntax error in $FILE'; fi
